title: Aurora, 61395, Pickle PenguIn, Soft Toy, 7In, Soft Toy, Grey & White
features: From Aurora's range of Cuddle Pals
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable super soft Pickle Penguin cuddly toy
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Cuddle Pals is Aurora World’s cutest and cuddliest range of collectable animals. Introducing our gorgeous grey and white Penguin named Pickle. Made using the softest materials, you will not believe until you touch her, how soft the material is. Pickle is the perfect present for birthdays, Christmas and just because. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
